title: Add --compress, --rm, --squash flags as a noop for bud
body:
We don't have a client server operation, so there
is no reason to compress the input.

We don't currently support cache so --rm and --squash are NOOPS

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
For all these flags that are noop, can we add a line of debug output saying as much when the user provides them as a parameter (when debug is specified)?

eg.
_--compress flag provided, but does not change buildah behaviour (NOOP)_

That way, if someone is expecting a change in behaviour when providing the parameter they can see it 'not working' as intentional and raise a bug/issue to resolve it?

:pushpin: Commit b432b33 has been approved by `rhatdan`
